subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with the Sacred Tree! Thy letter hath arrived, and from the meanings of the words thou hast turned to the Kingdom of the Lord of Signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انتسب الی الشجره المقدسه نامه رسید و از معانی کلمات تبتل بملکوت رب ایات
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
